svg.title: Dhara GP SVS – Daily water supply workflow
svg.desc: Full workflow from GP user login via Panchayat Darpan API through daily supply entry, supply status decision, and final submission to dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Panchayat Darpan login API work?')
sendPrompt('What are the filter levels for SVS daily supply?')
g.text: Select: District → Tehsil → Gram Panchayat → Village
Loaded from IMS / village master (52,000+ villages)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What scheme data loads after village selection?')
g.text: Scheme name, handover date, no. of HH connections

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields are in the daily supply entry form?')
g.text: OHT / village reading, geo-tagged photo, date

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What to fill when supply is yes?')
sendPrompt('What to fill for partial water supply?')
sendPrompt('What to fill when supply is no?')
sendPrompt('What are the reason options for no or partial supply?')
g.text: Motor pump / Pipeline damage / Electricity failure
Tubewell / Tanker arranged / Other — then add Remarks
GPS coordinates auto-attached — mandatory for Dhara module

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when the form is submitted?')
sendPrompt('What does the GIS dashboard show after submission?')
sendPrompt('What does the daily supply report contain?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the Excel download report?')
